endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/tags
endpoints.description: Lists a collection of tags defined within a service instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/tags/{tagId}
endpoints.description: Gets the details of the tag specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{TAGID}} with a real tagid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/tags/{tagId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{TAGID}} with a real tagid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/tags/{tagId}
endpoints.description: Deletes specific tag of the API Management service instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{TAGID}} with a real tagid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/tags/{tagId}
endpoints.description: Updates the details of the tag specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{TAGID}} with a real tagid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: HEAD /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/tags/{tagId}
endpoints.description: Gets the entity state version of the tag specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{TAGID}} with a real tagid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
